expected_red_failures: Providers API > POST /api/providers/export should return a secret-free provider bundle: expected 200, received 405
Providers API > POST /api/providers/export should not include active or default provider state: expected 200, received 405
Providers API > POST /api/providers/export should not write provider index or managed settings: expected 200, received 405
validation_output.red_assessment: Valid RED. Failures point to missing /api/providers/export route/behavior, not syntax or setup errors.

must_preserve_evidence.MP-004: Added default export test asserting containsSecrets:false, credential status redacted, no provider apiKey field, and serialized bundle excludes sk-test-key-123.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Assertions are server/API-level against handleProvidersApi, so redaction must be server-owned rather than frontend-only.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-007: Added active/default state exclusion test after activating a provider; asserts activeId, activeProviderId, and defaultProviderId are absent.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-001: Secret-free export test covers bundle kind/schemaVersion and raw key exclusion.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-003: Active/default selection is asserted absent from the export bundle.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-006: Test uses stored provider key sk-test-key-123 and requires API export serialization not to contain it.

concerns: Only API-level RED tests were added. Service-level export behavior is indirectly required by the route implementation, but no direct ProviderService export method test was added because current patterns primarily exercise provider API plus service CRUD.
recovery_hints: Implement POST /api/providers/export in src/server/api/providers.ts before /api/providers/:id handling.

Add a ProviderService export method that reads current provider index, selects providerIds or all providers, emits schemaVersion 1 and kind cc-jiangxia-provider-bundle, sets containsSecrets:false, maps credentials to { status: 'redacted' }, and never writes providers.json or settings.json.
Keep activeId/default provider state out of the bundle entirely.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
